programme.desc: The owner (Vince Vaughn) of a gym and an overbearing entrepreneur (Ben Stiller) form dodgeball teams to compete for $50,000 in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A detective (Samuel L. Jackson) and a narcotics cop (Vanessa L. Williams) track a sociopath out to kill a woman who can testify that he committed murder.

programme.title: Power Book IV: Force
programme.sub-title: There's Always a Price to Pay

programme.title: Power Book IV: Force
programme.desc: Tommy finds a way to protect D-Mac; Jenard mends fences to please Shanti.

programme.title: Power Book IV: Force
programme.desc: Diamond and Jenard strengthen their relationship over a common enemy, while Tommy ties up a loose end.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: After a drug bust, a former marine is recruited by authorities to go under cover in a notoriously dangerous prison. After discovering an underground fight ring, he must fight to stay alive and take down the corrupt system.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: The All-American Girls Professional Baseball League begins in 1943 with a major-league has-been as a manager.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A pimp (Terrence Howard) in Memphis, Tenn., sees rap music as the way to escape his dead-end existence and achieve something meaningful.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his future brother-in-law, a fast-talking trainee, tangle with Atlanta's most-dangerous criminal.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Rosario discovers a hidden chamber that's filled with occult artifacts tied to dark generational rituals. As supernatural occurrences begin to plague her, she must confront her family's buried secrets and face the truth about the choices they made.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: An assassin's (Timothy Olyphant) growing attachment to a traumatized young woman poses a threat to his life, as great as that of the Interpol and Russian agents on his trail.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pacemaker manufacturer stands trial for murder after a wearer has a heart attack at the wheel and plows into a crowded park.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The bodies of two teen immigrants and a garment inspector found in the harbor point to sweatshop conditions.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation begins when Dr. Olivet (Carolyn McCormick) says she was molested by her gynecologist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Stone insists a shopkeeper's claim that he shot and killed two would-be robbers in self-defense is unacceptable because it is his second incident.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cerreta is shot when his cover is blown during his investigation of a South American gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two police officers have different points of view after witnessing what appears to be a nonviolent discussion by a couple outside a bar.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A smuggler dies when a heroin packet bursts in her stomach; officials accuse her diplomat boss of murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a Broadway director is accused of molesting his 5-year-old daughter, a social welfare activist abducts the child under the guise of protecting her.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a wealthy older woman is found dead in her apartment, Briscoe and Logan determine she was the victim of a lovers quarrel with her younger boyfriend.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan investigate the death of a Holocaust survivor who discovered the man she married was accused of war crimes against fellow Jews in Poland.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan investigate the murder of a woman whose troubled fiancé confesses to the crime, but insists his therapist forced him to do it.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: While en route to China to identify prehistoric anthropological remains, Booth and Brennan are called upon to solve a murder in midair when the flight attendant discovers a fully cooked human body in the plane's microwave.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate when a skull and other skeletal remains are found in a nationally protected wooded preserve; Brennan's recently acquitted father (Ryan O'Neal) finds a job as a teacher.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A shallow grave holds the remains of conjoined twins; Booth and Brennan infiltrate a circus community after they discover that the twins were jugglers there.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A man and his son discover a frozen body in a pond; Booth gets advice from one of his hockey idols.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Brennan and the team get a phone call from the Grave Digger, who informs them that Booth has been buried alive with only 24 hours of oxygen.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: The team investigates at a fantasy convention when a female science-fiction enthusiast is found murdered.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: While bungee-jumping, a couple discover a corpse at the bottom of a gorge; the lab goes into lockdown when an unknown substance begins oozing from the cadaver.

programme.desc: Fred buys half ownership of a professional fighter who can't fight.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred awaits a visit from his sister until he finds out that her new husband is white.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: After a doctor fails to find the reason for his headache, Lamont consults a psychiatrist to treat his pain.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred asks a professional gambler to teach Lamont and his friends a lesson.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: When Lamont falls for an older woman, Fred schemes to show him how ridiculous it is.

programme.desc: Lamont and Rollo mistakenly think Fred has only six months to live and set him up on a date with Lena Horne.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Grady feels out of place when he moves in with his daughter and her family.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred puts his home and business up for sale when he hears an intense earthquake will hit and looks for a shelter in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Sanford & Son

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is inside the bank when it gets robbed, and becomes a hostage.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A series of unexplained events follows a horrifying train derailment, leading some young filmmakers (Elle Fanning, Joel Courtney) to suspect that the catastrophe was not an accident.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Renfield, the tortured aide to his narcissistic boss, Dracula, is forced to procure his master's prey and do his every bidding. However, after centuries of servitude, he's ready to see if there's a life outside the shadow of the Prince of Darkness.

programme.title: Movie
